structuralIssues.description: 4 content sections empty: standards_landscape, standards_development, stakeholder_notes, key_risks, sources_summary.

structuralIssues.title: Villeroy & Boch 14,000+ product EPDs, Duravit IBU-verified — surprisingly advanced DPP readiness
structuralIssues.description: Villeroy & Boch Group publishes EPDs for Villeroy & Boch, Ideal Standard, and Gustavsberg brands — over 14,000 products. Duravit holds IBU-verified EPDs for sanitary ceramic and sanitary acrylic. EPDs cover washbasins, bidets, urinals, toilets, shower trays, cisterns — matching EN 997/EN 14688 scope exactly. EPD coverage among major European manufacturers is strong, comparable to fibre-cement (WCF) and flat glass (GLA) as DPP-ready exemplars.
structuralIssues.action_required: Document EPD readiness in content. Note as DPP-ready exemplar despite late timeline.

structuralIssues.title: European Water Label (90+ brands) may influence CPR water efficiency requirements — DPP data ready
structuralIssues.description: European Water Label voluntary scheme (UK 2007, CEIR 2012, FECS ceramics 2014) supported by 90+ European brands. Covers baths, WC suites, cisterns, taps, showers, flow regulators. Not yet mandatory under CPR, but water efficiency flagged as potential new essential characteristic. Water consumption data (litres/flush, litres/minute) could become mandatory DPP declaration. The existing Water Label database infrastructure could transition to DPP format.
structuralIssues.action_required: Document water efficiency as potential future CPR characteristic in content.key_risks.

structuralIssues.title: European sanitary ware $11.3B (2024) — latest DPP timeline, AVCP System 4, ceramic-dominated
structuralIssues.description: European sanitary ware market $11.31B (2024), projected $16.98B by 2032 (CAGR 5.2%). European ceramic sanitary ware $10.70B (2023). WC segment 28.7%. Germany leads. Key players: Roca, Villeroy & Boch, Geberit, Duravit, TOTO. SAP shares latest DPP timeline (~2033-2034) with PTA. AVCP System 4 (manufacturer self-declaration). Material diversity manageable: ceramic dominant, acrylic secondary.
structuralIssues.action_required: Include market context and DPP timeline position in content.
